name: chatgpt-workspace-exporter
description: A local Chrome extension for exporting ChatGPT Workspace conversations.

scripts.check: node --check src/content.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check popup/popup.js
scripts.package: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/chatgpt-workspace-exporter.zip manifest.json README.md LICENSE src popup
